date_notes: DynaLife assumed services July 2022; exact handover date to confirm.
title_en: Private provider assumes Calgary community laboratory services
title_fr: Un prestataire privé prend en charge les services de laboratoire communautaires de Calgary
description_en: Private provider DynaLife assumes community lab services in the Calgary zone under contract, expanding the approach that followed the public superlab cancellation.
